common.copyright: © {{makahiki}} HomeInventory - Ua mālama ʻia nā kuleana āpau ma ka liʻiliʻi loa o ka {__>>HI_SEP} ma lalo o {__>>HI_S} ka helu haʻahaʻa, ka helu, a me ka hōʻailona.

login.title: E mālama pono i kāu waihona home a pau
login.subtitle: Welina mai i ka HomeInventory
login.welcome: inoa mea hoʻohana a leka uila
login.terms_title: 📋 Nā Manaʻo o ka hoʻohana a me ka hōʻole
login.terms_beta: Manaʻo BETA: Aia ʻo HomeInventory i ka manawa hoʻāʻo. ʻAʻole hāʻawi ʻia kahi hōʻoia e pili ana i ka hoʻomau a palekana paha o kāu ʻikepili.
login.terms_disclaimer: Hōʻole: Ma ka hoʻohana ʻana i kēia palapala noi, ʻae ʻoe ʻaʻole hiki iā ʻoe ke koi i ka uku no ka nalowale ʻana o ka ʻikepili, nā pilikia komo, a i ʻole nā ​​​​hana ʻenehana ʻē aʻe.
login.terms_backup: Hoʻihoʻi ʻikepili: Manaʻo mākou e kākoʻo mau i kāu ʻike koʻikoʻi.
login.terms_accept: Ma ke komo ʻana, ua manaʻo ʻia ua ʻae ʻoe i kēia mau ʻōlelo.

register.title: Welina mai i ka HomeInventory
register.subtitle: E hana i moʻokāki hou a i ʻole e hui pū me kahi hale e kū nei
register.create_house: E hana i ka Hale Hou
register.create_house_desc: 🏠 E hana ʻia kahi hale hou a loaʻa iā ʻoe kahi kī ʻokoʻaHouse. E kaʻana like i kēia kī me ka ʻohana no ke komo ʻana i ka waihona like.
register.join_house_desc: 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Enter the House Key shared with you to join an existing house. Everyone with the key can access the shared inventory.
register.password_confirm: E hōʻoia i ka ʻōlelo huna
register.password_confirm_placeholder: E hoʻokomo hou i ka ʻōlelo huna
register.house_key_placeholder: Hoʻopili i ke kī hale 64-character House <<<__HI_SEP__><<>> Hoʻokumu hou i ka hale <<<__HI_SEP__><<>>
register.terms: Nā Manaʻo o ka hoʻohana a me ka hōʻole
register.passwords_mismatch: ʻAʻole i kūlike nā ʻōlelo huna
register.password_length: ʻO ka ʻōlelo huna he 6 ma lalo o 6 mau huaʻōlelo
register.key_required: Pono ke kī hale e hui i kahi hale e kū nei

key_created.title: 🎉 Hana ʻia ka Hale!
key_created.subtitle: E mālama i ke kī ma lalo ma kahi palekana
key_created.warning: Mea nui: Hoʻokahi wale nō e hōʻike ʻia kēia kī. Kaʻana like me nā lālā o ka ʻohana i hiki iā lākou ke komo i ka papa helu hoʻokahi.
key_created.button: Ua mālama au i ke kī, hoʻomau

email_verification.title: 📧 Pono ka hōʻoia leka uila
email_verification.message: Hana ʻia ka moʻokāki! E ʻoluʻolu e hōʻoia i kāu leka uila e komo.
email_verification.step_1: Ua hoʻouna mākou i leka uila hōʻoia iā <1>{{email}}</1>.
email_verification.step_2: Kaomi i ke pihi <1>"E hōʻoia i kaʻu moʻokāki"</1> ma ka leka uila.
email_verification.step_3: Ma hope o ka hōʻoia ʻana, <1>hiki iā ʻoe ke komo aku</1>.
email_verification.spam_note: E nānā i ka waihona spam/junk inā ʻaʻole hiki mai ka leka uila.
email_verification.key_note: Mea nui: Ua hoʻouna pū ʻia kāu kī hale ma ka leka uila. Hiki iā ʻoe ke kaʻana like me nā ʻohana.

forgot_password.title: Poina i ka ʻōlelo huna

forgot_password.identifier_placeholder: e.g. john a i ʻole john@example.com
forgot_password.email_success: Inā loaʻa kahi moʻokāki, ua hoʻouna ʻia kahi loulou hoʻonohonoho ʻōlelo huna no 15 mau minuke.
forgot_password.recovery_mode_info: Ua pio ka leka uila ma kēia kikowaena. E hoʻomau me ka Recovery Key āu i mālama ai i ka wā hoʻonohonoho moʻokāki.
forgot_password.confirm_password: E hōʻoia i ka ʻōlelo huna hou

forgot_password.reset_submit: Hoʻopaʻa hou i ka ʻōlelo huna

recovery_setup.description: No ka mea ua pio ka leka uila, hiki iā ʻoe ke hoʻonohonoho hou i kāu ʻōlelo huna me kēia kī i ka wā e hiki mai ana.

recovery_key_modal.reset_title: mālama i kāu kī hoʻihoʻi hou kēia <<<>>HI_SEP__ hōʻike ʻia ke kī hoʻokahi wale nō.
recovery_key_modal.settings_title: Inā nalowale kēia kī iā ʻoe ke pio ka leka uila, ʻaʻole hiki iā ʻoe ke hoʻihoʻi i kāu ʻōlelo huna. E kope a mālama pono.

my_houses.title: My Houses

house_info.invite_desc: Share your house key to let family members access the same inventory. Each member logs in with their own account but accesses the same data.

security.recovery_key_modal_desc: Confirm your current password to continue. The new key will be shown only once.

hero.description: Digitize your home inventory. Categorize items, invite family, and access from anywhere. Modern, secure, and easy to use.

features.title: Why <1>HomeInventory</1>?
features.subtitle: All features to simplify home management in one platform

categorize.title: Categorize Items
categorize.desc: Organize all items by room and category, find what you need in seconds.

family.title: Invite Family with House Key
family.desc: Invite family members with your unique house key, manage inventory together.

access.title: Access from Anywhere
access.desc: At home, at work, or on vacation - securely access your inventory from anywhere.

barcode.title: Quick Add with Barcode
barcode.desc: Scan product barcodes, details are filled automatically.

security.title: Secure and Private
security.desc: Your data is encrypted and protected with KVKK compliant infrastructure.

backup.title: Backup & Export
backup.desc: Backup your inventory in JSON format, restore whenever you want.

cta_bottom.title: Start Using Now!
cta_bottom.description: Create a free account and digitize your home inventory. Registration takes only a few seconds.

footer.desc: The easy and secure platform to digitize your home inventory.

landing.preview_privacy_notice: Demo view: no real user data is displayed.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.content: Here you can add and list your items. Track all home items in one place!

house_key.title: House Key
house_key.content: This is your house key, use it to invite others. Add family members to your house!

categories.title: Categories
categories.content: Organize by categorizing your items. Electronics, furniture, kitchen, and more!

features: 💡 You can be a member of multiple houses and switch between them. Each house maintains a separate inventory.

vault.title: Waihona Pilikino
vault.subtitle: He wahi pilikino e wehe ʻia ai ka hoʻopāpā ma loko nō o ka polokalamu kele pūnaewele, a ʻaʻole hiki i ka kikowaena ke heluhelu iā ia ma ke ʻano he kikokikona maʻamau.
vault.setup_description: Hana ʻia ke kī o ka waihona ma ka polokalamu kele pūnaewele. Mālama wale ka kikowaena i ke kī i wahī ʻia a me nā moʻolelo i hoʻopāpā ʻia.
vault.setup_warning: Inā nalowale ka ʻōlelo huna o ka waihona a me ke kī hoʻihoʻi, ʻaʻole hiki ke hoʻihoʻi ʻia ka ʻikepili.
vault.passphrase_placeholder: E koho i kahi ʻōlelo huna ikaika me ka liʻiliʻi he 12 mau huapalapala
vault.passphrase_confirm_placeholder: E hoʻokomo hou i ka ʻōlelo huna
vault.setting_up: Ke hoʻomākaukau nei i ka waihona...
vault.protection_title: He aha ka mea i pale ʻia e kēia?
vault.protection_item_1: Hoʻopāpā ʻia ka inoa mea, ka wehewehe, ka barcode, ke kumukūʻai, ka lā, a me nā kahua warranty ma ka polokalamu kele pūnaewele.
vault.protection_item_2: ʻIke wale ka kikowaena i ka pūʻolo i hoʻopāpā ʻia, ka helu mea, a me nā timestamp.
vault.protection_item_3: Ua hoʻolālā ʻia ka hoʻokuʻu mua no ka hoʻohana pilikino a me ka kikokikona; pono ka kaʻana like ʻana a me ka media i kahi kahe palekana ʻē aʻe.
vault.unlock_description: Hiki iā ʻoe ke wehe i ka waihona me kāu ʻōlelo huna a i ʻole ke kī hoʻihoʻi āu i mālama ai ma mua.
vault.unlock_passphrase_placeholder: E hoʻokomo i kāu ʻōlelo huna o ka waihona
vault.unlocking: Ke wehe nei i ka waihona...
vault.security_note_1: Noho wale ke kī o ka waihona i ka hoʻomanaʻo o ka polokalamu kele pūnaewele. Holoi ʻia ia ke haʻalele ʻoe i ka ʻaoʻao a i ʻole ke laka ʻoe i ka waihona.
vault.security_note_2: Inā poina ka ʻōlelo huna, hiki iā ʻoe ke hoʻohana i ke kī hoʻihoʻi. Inā nalowale lāua ʻelua, lilo ka ʻike i mea hiki ʻole ke kiʻi hou ʻia mau loa.
vault.recovery_ready_description: Hōʻike ʻia kēia kī hoʻokahi wale nō manawa. E mālama iā ia ma kahi palekana.
vault.recovery_visible_once: ʻAʻole e hōʻike hou ʻia kēia kī ma hope.
vault.recovery_file_title: HomeInventory Kī Hoʻihoʻi no ka Waihona Pilikino
vault.recovery_file_warning: Inā nalowale kēia kī a me kāu ʻōlelo huna waihona, ʻaʻole hiki ke hoʻihoʻi ʻia ka waihona.
vault.record_form_subtitle: Kokoke kēia i ke kahe mea maʻamau, akā ʻaʻole naʻe e haʻalele ka kikokikona maʻamau i ka polokalamu kele pūnaewele.
vault.barcode_privacy_hint: ʻAʻole nānā ʻakomi ʻia nā barcode o ka waihona ma nā lawelawe waho; mālama wale ʻia ka kikokikona barcode ma ke ʻano he ʻikepili i hoʻopāpā ʻia.
vault.media_note: Ua pio me ka manaʻo nā kiʻi, ka scan barcode, a me ka huli huahana waho i kēia kahe waihona mua. Pono lākou i kahi pipeline media a me ka pilikino i hoʻopāpā ʻia.
vault.search_placeholder: Huli i loko o ka waihona...
vault.empty_title: ʻAʻohe mea i loko o ka waihona i kēia manawa
vault.empty_description: E hoʻomaka ma ka hoʻohui ʻana i kāu moʻolelo waihona pilikino mua.
vault.empty_filter_title: ʻAʻohe moʻolelo e kūlike me ka kānana o kēia manawa
vault.empty_filter_description: E hoʻāʻo i kahi huli ʻē aʻe a i ʻole e hoʻololi i nā kānana.
vault.delete_confirm: Ua maopopo anei iā ʻoe makemake ʻoe e holoi i kēia moʻolelo waihona?
